---
title: "Final Project"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-07"
---

## Environment Set-up

```{r installations, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE , include=FALSE}
# Install R 4.4.1 first, then in RStudio:
install.packages(c("devtools", "readxl", "openxlsx", "tidyverse", "scCustomize"))
install.packages("Seurat")

# Bioconductor dependencies
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(c("NMF", "ComplexHeatmap", "BiocNeighbors",
                        "SingleCellExperiment", "circlize", 
                        "edgeR", "scDblFinder"), update = FALSE)

# CellChat from GitHub
devtools::install_github("jinworks/CellChat")
```


## Loading libraries

```{r libraries, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
library(tidyverse)
library(scCustomize)
library(edgeR)
library(scDblFinder)
library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
```


## Load data

```{r}

# Since files are directly in your working directory
b1_data_dir <- getwd()

# Confirm the files are visible
list.files(b1_data_dir)

# read data
b1 <- Read10X_GEO(data_dir = b1_data_dir, gene.column = 2)

# See what layers are inside b1
names(b1$GSM6190913_b1_)

# Gene expression matrix
dataset_rna_counts <- b1$GSM6190913_b1_$`Gene Expression`

# HTO (multiplexing barcodes) matrix
dataset_barcodes <- b1$GSM6190913_b1_$`Antibody Capture`

# Check dimensions
dim(dataset_rna_counts)  # should be: genes x cells
dim(dataset_barcodes)    # should be: barcodes x cells

```


## Seurat objects

```{r create-seurat, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Create Seurat object
# min.cells = 5 : remove genes expressed in fewer than 5 cells
# min.features = 200 : remove empty droplets with fewer than 200 genes
dataset <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = dataset_rna_counts,
  min.cells = 5,
  min.features = 200
)

# Check how many real cells remain after filtering
dataset
```


```{r joint-barcodes, warning=FALSE}
# Get RNA data as a layer
dataset_rna_counts2 <- LayerData(dataset, data = "RNA")

# Find barcodes common to both RNA and HTO
dataset_joint.barcodes <- intersect(
  colnames(dataset_rna_counts2),
  colnames(dataset_barcodes)
)

# How many joint barcodes?
length(dataset_joint.barcodes)
```


```{r add-hto}
# Subset both matrices to joint barcodes only
dataset_rna_counts2 <- dataset_rna_counts2[, dataset_joint.barcodes]
dataset_barcodes2   <- as.matrix(dataset_barcodes[, dataset_joint.barcodes])

# Add HTO as a new assay
dataset[["barcodes"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = dataset_barcodes2)

# Confirm both assays are present
Assays(dataset)
# Should show: "RNA" "barcodes"
```

```{r hto-demux}
# Normalize and demultiplex HTO barcodes
dataset <- HTODemux(
  dataset,
  assay = "barcodes",
  positive.quantile = 0.99
)
```

```{r remove-negatives}
# Remove cells with no barcode classification
Idents(dataset) <- "barcodes_classification.global"
dataset <- subset(dataset, idents = "Negative", invert = TRUE)

# Check how many cells remain
ncol(dataset)
```


```{r rename-barcodes}
# Check current barcode names first
Idents(dataset) <- "barcodes_maxID"
levels(dataset)
```

```{r rename-barcodes}
# Rename barcodes to their actual time/space labels
dataset <- RenameIdents(dataset,
  "Barcode-1"  = "D01_2mm",
  "Barcode-2"  = "D01_4mm",
  "Barcode-3"  = "D01_6mm",
  "Barcode-4"  = "D01_8mm",
  "Barcode-5"  = "D03_2mm",
  "Barcode-6"  = "D03_4mm",
  "Barcode-7"  = "D03_6mm",
  "Barcode-8"  = "D03_8mm",
  "Barcode-9"  = "D07_2mm",
  "Barcode-10" = "D07_4mm",
  "Barcode-11" = "D07_6mm",
  "Barcode-12" = "D07_8mm",
  "Barcode-13" = "D14_2mm",
  "Barcode-14" = "D14_4mm",
  "Barcode-15" = "D14_6mm",
  "Barcode-16" = "D14_8mm",
  "Barcode-17" = "UW"
)

# Save as new metadata column
dataset[["time_space"]] <- Idents(dataset)

# Confirm new labels
levels(dataset)
```


## QC

```{r mito-qc}
# Switch to RNA assay
DefaultAssay(dataset) <- "RNA"

# Calculate % mitochondrial genes per cell
# Mouse mito genes start with "mt-" (lowercase)
dataset[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(dataset, pattern = "^mt-")

# Visualize BEFORE filtering
plot1 <- FeatureScatter(dataset, 
                        feature1 = "nCount_RNA", 
                        feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot2 <- FeatureScatter(dataset, 
                        feature1 = "nFeature_RNA", 
                        feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot1 + plot2
```


```{r filter-cells}
# Remove low quality cells
# Keep only cells with >200 genes AND <25% mitochondrial content
dataset <- subset(dataset, 
                  subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & percent.mt < 25)

# Check how many cells remain after filtering
ncol(dataset)

# Visualize AFTER filtering - should look much cleaner
plot1 <- FeatureScatter(dataset, 
                        feature1 = "nCount_RNA", 
                        feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot2 <- FeatureScatter(dataset, 
                        feature1 = "nFeature_RNA", 
                        feature2 = "percent.mt")
plot1 + plot2

ncol(dataset)



```


```{r doublet-detection}
DefaultAssay(dataset) <- "RNA"

sce <- scDblFinder(
  GetAssayData(dataset, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts"),
  samples = Idents(dataset)
)

# Add doublet score to metadata
dataset$scDblFinder.score <- sce$scDblFinder.score

# Visualize doublet scores
VlnPlot(dataset, 
        features = "scDblFinder.score", 
        raster = FALSE, 
        pt.size = 0.5)
# Save plot to file instead
png("doublet_scores.png", width = 800, height = 500)
VlnPlot(dataset, 
        features = "scDblFinder.score", 
        raster = FALSE, 
        pt.size = 0.5)
dev.off()

```


```{r remove-doublets}
# Remove likely doublets above 0.25 threshold
dataset <- subset(dataset, scDblFinder.score < 0.25)

# Check how many cells remain
ncol(dataset)
```


```{r save-checkpoint}
saveRDS(dataset, "dataset_post_Method2.rds")
```


## Step 3: Seurat Clustering and Cell Type Annotation

```{r load-checkpoint}
dataset <- readRDS("dataset_post_Method2.rds")

# Confirm it loaded correctly
dataset
```


```{r seurat-pipeline}
DefaultAssay(dataset) <- "RNA"

# Normalize the data
dataset <- NormalizeData(dataset)

# Find variable features
dataset <- FindVariableFeatures(dataset)

# Scale the data
dataset <- ScaleData(dataset)

# Run PCA
dataset <- RunPCA(dataset)
```


```{r elbow-plot}
ElbowPlot(dataset, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)
```

## UMAP

```{r clustering}
# Find neighbors using 13 PCs
dataset <- FindNeighbors(dataset, dims = 1:13)

# Cluster at resolution 0.1 (low = fewer, broader clusters)
dataset <- FindClusters(dataset, resolution = 0.1)

# Run UMAP
dataset <- RunUMAP(dataset, dims = 1:13, seed.use = 123)

# Visualize clusters
DimPlot(dataset, group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
        label = TRUE, raster = FALSE)
```


```{r umap-timespace}
DimPlot(dataset, group.by = "time_space", 
        label = FALSE, raster = FALSE)
```


```{r find-markers}
Idents(dataset) <- "seurat_clusters"

Cell_markers <- FindAllMarkers(dataset,
  max.cells.per.ident = 500,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.10,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25)

# Save to file
write.csv(Cell_markers, "dataset_cluster_markers.csv")

# Preview top markers per cluster
Cell_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC)
```


```{r top-markers}
Cell_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 5, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
  print(n = 50)
```


```{r top-markers-clean}
top_markers <- Cell_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
  select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC)

print(top_markers, n = 50)
```

```{r all-markers}
top_markers <- Cell_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
  select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC) %>%
  arrange(cluster)

print(top_markers, n = 100)
```


```{r annotate-clusters}
Idents(dataset) <- "seurat_clusters"
dataset[["cell_types"]] <- Idents(dataset)
Idents(dataset) <- "cell_types"

dataset <- RenameIdents(dataset,
  "0" = "Epithelial cell",
  "1" = "Neutrophil",
  "2" = "Macrophage",
  "3" = "Fibroblast",
  "4" = "Endothelial cell",
  "5" = "T cell",
  "6" = "Fibroblast",
  "7" = "Smooth muscle cell"
)

dataset[["cell_types"]] <- Idents(dataset)

# Visualize annotated UMAP
DimPlot(dataset, group.by = "cell_types",
        label = FALSE, raster = FALSE)
```


```{r dotplot}
DotPlot(dataset, group.by = "cell_types",
        features = c("Dsp", "Cxcr1", "Arg1", 
                     "Snhg11", "Grrp1", "Tcrg-C2", 
                     "Oxtr", "Nrip2")) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  scale_colour_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "grey", high = "red")
```

```{r save-step3}
saveRDS(dataset, "dataset_post_Method3.rds")
```


## Step 4: Fibroblast Subtype Analysis
```{r subset-fibroblasts}
dataset <- readRDS("dataset_post_Method3.rds")

# Subset only fibroblasts
Idents(dataset) <- "cell_types"
dataset_fibroblast <- subset(dataset, idents = "Fibroblast")

# Check how many fibroblasts we have
ncol(dataset_fibroblast)
```


```{r fibroblast-pca}
dataset_fibroblast <- RunPCA(dataset_fibroblast, verbose = TRUE)

# Check elbow plot - paper uses 9 PCs for fibroblasts
ElbowPlot(dataset_fibroblast, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)
```

```{r fibroblast-clustering}
# Cluster using 9 PCs
dataset_fibroblast <- FindNeighbors(dataset_fibroblast, dims = 1:9)
dataset_fibroblast <- FindClusters(dataset_fibroblast, resolution = 0.1)

# Run UMAP
dataset_fibroblast <- RunUMAP(dataset_fibroblast, 
                               dims = 1:9, 
                               seed.use = 123)

# Visualize
DimPlot(dataset_fibroblast, group.by = "seurat_clusters", 
        label = TRUE, raster = FALSE)
```

```{r fibroblast-markers}
Idents(dataset_fibroblast) <- "seurat_clusters"

fibroblast_markers <- FindAllMarkers(dataset_fibroblast,
  max.cells.per.ident = 500,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.10,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25)

# Save to file
write.csv(fibroblast_markers, "fibroblast_cluster_markers.csv")

# View top 3 markers per cluster
fibroblast_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
  select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC) %>%
  arrange(cluster) %>%
  print(n = 20)

fibroblast_markers %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
    select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC) %>%
    arrange(cluster)

```


```{r fibroblast-dotplot}
FB_markers <- c("Ptgis", "Prg4", "Cxcl5",
                "Cdh4", "Aldh3a1", "Pla2g2e",
                "Corin", "Edn3", "Sostdc1")

DotPlot(dataset_fibroblast,
        group.by = "seurat_clusters",
        features = FB_markers) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  scale_colour_gradient2(midpoint = 0, 
                         low = "blue", 
                         mid = "grey", 
                         high = "red")
```

```{r save-fibroblast}
saveRDS(dataset_fibroblast, "dataset_fibroblast_post_Method4.rds")
```


## Phases specific gene list

```{r download-gene-list}
# Download file directly from JoVE
download.file(
  url = "https://www.jove.com/files/ftp_upload/67266/JoVE_PhaseSpecificGenes.txt",
  destfile = "JoVE_PhaseSpecificGenes.txt"
)

# Load it
PhaseSpecificGenes <- read_delim("JoVE_PhaseSpecificGenes.txt",
                                  delim = "\t", col_names = TRUE)

# Check what's inside
head(PhaseSpecificGenes)
```


```{r add-module-scores}
# Separate into three gene lists
PS_Inflammatory_ms <- lapply(PhaseSpecificGenes[1], str_to_sentence)
PS_Proliferative_ms <- lapply(PhaseSpecificGenes[2], str_to_sentence)
PS_Resolution_ms <- lapply(PhaseSpecificGenes[3], str_to_sentence)

# Add module scores to dataset
dataset <- AddModuleScore(dataset,
                          features = PS_Inflammatory_ms,
                          ctrl = 100,
                          name = "Inflammatory")

dataset <- AddModuleScore(dataset,
                          features = PS_Proliferative_ms,
                          ctrl = 100,
                          name = "Proliferative")

dataset <- AddModuleScore(dataset,
                          features = PS_Resolution_ms,
                          ctrl = 100,
                          name = "Resolution")
```


```{r module-score-plots}
# First set DPW groups
Idents(dataset) <- "time_space"
dataset[["DPW"]] <- Idents(dataset)
Idents(dataset) <- "DPW"

new.cluster.ids <- c("D1","D1","D1","D1",
                     "D3","D3","D3","D3",
                     "D7","D7","D7","D7",
                     "D14","D14","D14","D14","UW")
names(new.cluster.ids) <- levels(dataset)
dataset <- RenameIdents(dataset, new.cluster.ids)
dataset[["DPW"]] <- Idents(dataset)

# Visualize module scores by cell type
DotPlot(dataset, group.by = "cell_types",
        features = c("Inflammatory1",
                     "Proliferative1",
                     "Resolution1")) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  scale_colour_gradient2(midpoint = 0,
                         low = "blue",
                         mid = "grey",
                         high = "red")
```

```{r module-score-dpw}
DotPlot(dataset, group.by = "DPW",
        features = c("Inflammatory1",
                     "Proliferative1",
                     "Resolution1")) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  scale_colour_gradient2(midpoint = 0,
                         low = "blue",
                         mid = "grey",
                         high = "red")
```

```{r save-step5}
saveRDS(dataset, "dataset_post_Method5.rds")
```


## Cell chat

```{r check-dpw}
# Check how many cells per DPW
table(dataset$DPW)
```


## Step 7: Dataset Integration

```{r download-batch3}
# Download batch 3 files directly
download.file(
  url = "https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/samples/GSM6190nnn/GSM6190915/suppl/GSM6190915_b3_barcodes.tsv.gz",
  destfile = "GSM6190915_b3_barcodes.tsv.gz"
)

download.file(
  url = "https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/samples/GSM6190nnn/GSM6190915/suppl/GSM6190915_b3_features.tsv.gz",
  destfile = "GSM6190915_b3_features.tsv.gz"
)

download.file(
  url = "https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/samples/GSM6190nnn/GSM6190915/suppl/GSM6190915_b3_matrix.mtx.gz",
  destfile = "GSM6190915_b3_matrix.mtx.gz"
)

# Confirm files are there
list.files(pattern = "b3")
```


```{r load-batch3}
# Point to working directory for batch 3 files
b3_data_dir <- getwd()

# Load batch 3
b3 <- Read10X_GEO(data_dir = b3_data_dir, gene.column = 2)

# Check layers
names(b3$GSM6190915_b3_)
```

```{r process-batch3}
# Separate RNA and HTO
dataset_rna_counts_b3 <- b3$GSM6190915_b3_$`Gene Expression`
dataset_barcodes_b3   <- b3$GSM6190915_b3_$`Antibody Capture`

# Create Seurat object
dataset_b3 <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = dataset_rna_counts_b3,
  min.cells = 5,
  min.features = 200
)

# Check dimensions
dataset_b3
```

```{r demux-batch3}
# Find joint barcodes
dataset_rna_counts2_b3 <- LayerData(dataset_b3, data = "RNA")

dataset_joint.barcodes_b3 <- intersect(
  colnames(dataset_rna_counts2_b3),
  colnames(dataset_barcodes_b3)
)

# Subset to joint barcodes
dataset_rna_counts2_b3 <- dataset_rna_counts2_b3[, dataset_joint.barcodes_b3]
dataset_barcodes2_b3   <- as.matrix(dataset_barcodes_b3[, dataset_joint.barcodes_b3])

# Add HTO assay
dataset_b3[["barcodes"]] <- CreateAssayObject(counts = dataset_barcodes2_b3)

# Demultiplex
dataset_b3 <- HTODemux(
  dataset_b3,
  assay = "barcodes",
  positive.quantile = 0.99
)

# Remove negatives
Idents(dataset_b3) <- "barcodes_classification.global"
dataset_b3 <- subset(dataset_b3, idents = "Negative", invert = TRUE)

# Check cells remaining
ncol(dataset_b3)
```


```{r rename-qc-batch3}
# Rename barcodes
Idents(dataset_b3) <- "barcodes_maxID"
dataset_b3 <- RenameIdents(dataset_b3,
  "Barcode-1"  = "D01_2mm",
  "Barcode-2"  = "D01_4mm",
  "Barcode-3"  = "D01_6mm",
  "Barcode-4"  = "D01_8mm",
  "Barcode-5"  = "D03_2mm",
  "Barcode-6"  = "D03_4mm",
  "Barcode-7"  = "D03_6mm",
  "Barcode-8"  = "D03_8mm",
  "Barcode-9"  = "D07_2mm",
  "Barcode-10" = "D07_4mm",
  "Barcode-11" = "D07_6mm",
  "Barcode-12" = "D07_8mm",
  "Barcode-13" = "D14_2mm",
  "Barcode-14" = "D14_4mm",
  "Barcode-15" = "D14_6mm",
  "Barcode-16" = "D14_8mm",
  "Barcode-17" = "UW"
)
dataset_b3[["time_space"]] <- Idents(dataset_b3)

# Mitochondrial QC
DefaultAssay(dataset_b3) <- "RNA"
dataset_b3[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(dataset_b3, pattern = "^mt-")
dataset_b3 <- subset(dataset_b3, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & percent.mt < 25)

# Doublet removal
sce_b3 <- scDblFinder(
  GetAssayData(dataset_b3, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts"),
  samples = Idents(dataset_b3)
)
dataset_b3$scDblFinder.score <- sce_b3$scDblFinder.score
dataset_b3 <- subset(dataset_b3, scDblFinder.score < 0.25)

# Check final cell count
ncol(dataset_b3)
```

```{r save-batch3}
saveRDS(dataset_b3, "dataset_b3_post_Method2.rds")
```


```{r merge-batches}
# Load batch 1
dataset <- readRDS("dataset_post_Method2.rds")

# Add batch labels
dataset@meta.data$batch <- "b1"
dataset_b3@meta.data$batch <- "b3"

# Merge both datasets
dataset_merged <- merge(
  x = dataset,
  y = dataset_b3,
  add.cell.ids = c("b1", "b3"),
  merge.data = TRUE
)

# Check merged dataset
dataset_merged
```

```{r merged-pipeline}
DefaultAssay(dataset_merged) <- "RNA"

dataset_merged <- NormalizeData(dataset_merged)
dataset_merged <- FindVariableFeatures(dataset_merged)
dataset_merged <- ScaleData(dataset_merged)
dataset_merged <- RunPCA(dataset_merged)

# Check elbow plot
ElbowPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)

png("elbow_merged.png", width = 800, height = 500)
ElbowPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)
dev.off()
```

```{r merged-clustering}
dataset_merged <- FindNeighbors(dataset_merged, dims = 1:10, reduction = "pca")
dataset_merged <- FindClusters(dataset_merged, resolution = 0.1,
                                cluster.name = "unintegrated_clusters")
dataset_merged <- RunUMAP(dataset_merged, dims = 1:10, seed.use = 123,
                           reduction = "pca",
                           reduction.name = "umap.unintegrated")

# Visualize by cluster and batch
png("umap_unintegrated.png", width = 1200, height = 500)
DimPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "umap.unintegrated",
        group.by = c("seurat_clusters", "batch"))
dev.off()

png("umap_unintegrated.png", width = 1200, height = 500)
DimPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "umap.unintegrated",
        group.by = c("unintegrated_clusters", "batch"))
```

```{r rpca-integration}
dataset_merged <- IntegrateLayers(
  object = dataset_merged,
  method = RPCAIntegration,
  orig.reduction = "pca",
  new.reduction = "integrated.rpca",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Cluster and UMAP after integration
dataset_merged <- FindNeighbors(dataset_merged, dims = 1:10,
                                 reduction = "integrated.rpca")
dataset_merged <- FindClusters(dataset_merged, resolution = 0.1,
                                cluster.name = "rpca_clusters")
dataset_merged <- RunUMAP(dataset_merged, dims = 1:10, seed.use = 123,
                           reduction = "integrated.rpca",
                           reduction.name = "umap.rpca")

# Visualize after integration
png("umap_integrated.png", width = 1200, height = 500)
DimPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "umap.rpca",
        group.by = c("rpca_clusters", "batch"))
dev.off()
```


```{r join-layers}
# Join layers after integration
dataset_merged <- JoinLayers(dataset_merged)

# Add time_space and DPW metadata
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "time_space"
dataset_merged[["DPW"]] <- Idents(dataset_merged)
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "DPW"

new.cluster.ids <- c("D1","D1","D1","D1",
                     "D3","D3","D3","D3",
                     "D7","D7","D7","D7",
                     "D14","D14","D14","D14","UW")
names(new.cluster.ids) <- levels(dataset_merged)
dataset_merged <- RenameIdents(dataset_merged, new.cluster.ids)
dataset_merged[["DPW"]] <- Idents(dataset_merged)

# Check cell counts per DPW
table(dataset_merged$DPW)
```

```{r check-timespace}
# Check what time_space labels exist in merged dataset
table(dataset_merged$time_space)
```


```{r fix-dpw}
# Rename only the levels that actually exist
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "time_space"

dataset_merged <- RenameIdents(dataset_merged,
  "D01_4mm" = "D1",
  "D01_6mm" = "D1",
  "D01_8mm" = "D1",
  "D03_4mm" = "D3",
  "D03_6mm" = "D3",
  "D07_4mm" = "D7",
  "D07_6mm" = "D7",
  "D07_8mm" = "D7",
  "D14_8mm" = "D14",
  "UW"      = "UW"
)

dataset_merged[["DPW"]] <- Idents(dataset_merged)

# Check again
table(dataset_merged$DPW)
```

```{r save-merged}
saveRDS(dataset_merged, "merged_dataset_post_Method7.rds")
```


```{r annotate-merged}
# Run FindAllMarkers on merged dataset to annotate clusters
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "rpca_clusters"

# Visualize clusters first
png("umap_merged_clusters.png", width = 800, height = 600)
DimPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "umap.rpca",
        group.by = "rpca_clusters",
        label = TRUE, raster = FALSE)
dev.off()

# Check markers
merged_markers <- FindAllMarkers(dataset_merged,
  max.cells.per.ident = 500,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.10,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25)

# Top 3 per cluster
merged_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
  select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC) %>%
  arrange(cluster)

merged_markers %>%
group_by(cluster) %>%
top_n(n = 3, wt = avg_log2FC) %>%
select(cluster, gene, avg_log2FC) %>%
arrange(cluster)

```


```{r annotate-merged}
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "rpca_clusters"

dataset_merged <- RenameIdents(dataset_merged,
  "0" = "Macrophage",
  "1" = "Neutrophil",
  "2" = "T cell",
  "3" = "Fibroblast",
  "4" = "Endothelial cell",
  "5" = "Fibroblast",
  "6" = "Epithelial cell",
  "7" = "Fibroblast",
  "8" = "Smooth muscle cell",
  "9" = "Fibroblast"
)

dataset_merged[["cell_types"]] <- Idents(dataset_merged)

# Visualize
png("umap_merged_annotated.png", width = 800, height = 600)
DimPlot(dataset_merged, reduction = "umap.rpca",
        group.by = "cell_types",
        label = FALSE, raster = FALSE)
dev.off()

# Save
saveRDS(dataset_merged, "merged_dataset_post_Method7.rds")
```

## Step 6: CellChat
```{r cellchat-subset}
# Subset into D1 and D14
Idents(dataset_merged) <- "DPW"
dataset_D1  <- subset(dataset_merged, idents = "D1")
dataset_D14 <- subset(dataset_merged, idents = "D14")

# Check cell counts
table(dataset_D1$cell_types)
table(dataset_D14$cell_types)
```

## Step 6: CellChat
```{r cellchat-setup}
# Create CellChat objects for D1 and D14
Idents(dataset_D1) <- "cell_types"
Idents(dataset_D14) <- "cell_types"

cellchat_D1 <- createCellChat(dataset_D1, 
                               group.by = "ident", 
                               assay = "RNA")
cellchat_D14 <- createCellChat(dataset_D14, 
                                group.by = "ident", 
                                assay = "RNA")

# Use mouse database
CellChatDB.use <- CellChatDB.mouse
cellchat_D1@DB <- CellChatDB.use
cellchat_D14@DB <- CellChatDB.use

# Subset to expressed genes
cellchat_D1 <- subsetData(cellchat_D1)
cellchat_D14 <- subsetData(cellchat_D14)
```

```{r cellchat-run}
# Use parallel processing to speed things up
future::plan("multisession", workers = 4)

# Identify overexpressed genes and interactions
cellchat_D1 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat_D1, do.fast = F)
cellchat_D1 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat_D1)

cellchat_D14 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat_D14, do.fast = F)
cellchat_D14 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat_D14)

# Compute communication probabilities
cellchat_D1 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_D1, 
                                  type = "triMean", 
                                  population.size = TRUE)
cellchat_D14 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat_D14, 
                                   type = "triMean", 
                                   population.size = TRUE)

# Filter out weak interactions
cellchat_D1 <- filterCommunication(cellchat_D1, min.cells = 10)
cellchat_D14 <- filterCommunication(cellchat_D14, min.cells = 10)

# Compute pathway level communication
cellchat_D1 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_D1)
cellchat_D14 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat_D14)

# Aggregate networks
cellchat_D1 <- aggregateNet(cellchat_D1)
cellchat_D14 <- aggregateNet(cellchat_D14)
```

```{r cellchat-visualize}
# Compute centrality
cellchat_D1 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_D1, slot.name = "netP")
cellchat_D14 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat_D14, slot.name = "netP")

# Visualize incoming vs outgoing interaction strengths
png("cellchat_scatter_D1.png", width = 600, height = 500)
netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(cellchat_D1)
dev.off()

png("cellchat_scatter_D14.png", width = 600, height = 500)
netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(cellchat_D14)
dev.off()

# Check significant pathways
cat("D1 pathways:\n")
print(cellchat_D1@netP$pathways)

cat("D14 pathways:\n")
print(cellchat_D14@netP$pathways)
```

```{r cellchat-collagen}
pathways.show <- c("COLLAGEN")

# Circle plots
png("collagen_circle_D1.png", width = 600, height = 600)
netVisual_aggregate(cellchat_D1, signaling = pathways.show, layout = "circle")
dev.off()

png("collagen_circle_D14.png", width = 600, height = 600)
netVisual_aggregate(cellchat_D14, signaling = pathways.show, layout = "circle")
dev.off()

# Save CellChat objects
saveRDS(cellchat_D1, "cellchat_D1.rds")
saveRDS(cellchat_D14, "cellchat_D14.rds")
```


```{r cellchat-comparison}
# Merge D1 and D14 for comparison
object.list <- list(D1 = cellchat_D1, D14 = cellchat_D14)
cellchat_merged <- mergeCellChat(object.list, 
                                  add.names = names(object.list))

# Compare total interactions
png("cellchat_compare.png", width = 800, height = 400)
gg1 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_merged, show.legend = F)
gg2 <- compareInteractions(cellchat_merged, show.legend = F, 
                            measure = "weight")
gg1 + gg2
dev.off()

# Save merged object
saveRDS(cellchat_merged, "cellchat_merged.rds")
```
